rulings.Case Title: MARY NICHOLS VS. MARK STREHLOW ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Alternatively Motion For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday January 23, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF MARK STREHLOW MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Alternatively Motion For Summary Adjudication DENIED. Motion for Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Triable issues of fact exit, e.g. fact 21 and 31. Evidentiary objections to Andrew Zacks (paragraph 2) and Robert Dusenbury Declarations (paragraph 3) are overruled. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: KEVIN AYERS ET AL VS. JEFF CREAR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday January 23, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFF KEVIN AYERS, JANICE SUKAITIS Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint GRANTED. No opposition. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES LI VS. MEI LING FANG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday January 23, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT DEMAS YAN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to assert facts (not conclusions) to support a claim under CCP 708.210. The Court notes that the complaint, as currently allege, appears to be a complaint for fraudulent transfer. Based on the opposition, this is not what Plaintiff indented to allege. Plaintiff shall amend the complaint to make his intended allegations in clear and concise language supported by facts establishing each element of CCP 708.210 claim. All amendments to be in bold font. Parties to comply with CCP 430.41 in future. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: WILMINGTON SAVINGS FUND SOCIETY, FSB VS. EMIL P MILYAKOV ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday January 23, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT EMIL MILYAKOV MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. The Court also notes that it is impossible to determine based on the POS on file (dated December 30, 2018 and filed on January 2, 2018) whether it attest to service of this motion (filed on January 2, 2019) or to another motion to vacate set for January 8, 2019 (also filed on January 2, 2019). = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN HOM VS. PURE ENTERTAINMENT, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday January 23, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT PURE ENTERTAINMENT, LLC MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is continued to January 28, 2019. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the opposition no later than January 23, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/CFH)
